title: Harden secure CoAP resources
description: Make /config writes default-deny with explicit opt-in, strictly validate SOS CBOR/from/t fields before mutation, and cap sent-message records plus dynamically mounted detail resources.
acceptance_criteria: Default config PUT is unauthorized and non-mutating; explicit opt-in allows valid writes; malformed SOS maps/identifiers/timestamps reject without activation; sent history and detail routes retain only the configured newest entries; focused tests, Ruff, mypy, and three reviews pass.
close_reason: Secure CoAP mutation resources now default deny, validate atomically, and retain bounded state.
